name: Alligator Jambalaya
recipeIngredient: 1 pound Marinated alligator fillet, cut into small pieces
1 pound Hot sausage (Italian), cut into chunks
2 cups Chicken stock (2 pkg. chicken cube mix + water also works)
1 tablespoon Cajun spices (blackened or cajun king herbed spice, excellent) - to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. In a deep frying pan (cast iron preferably), sauté the bell peppers, garlic, parsley, and celery.
2. While the vegetables are cooking, add tomatoes and their liquid, chicken stock, and green onion to a pot that can cook on the stove and in the oven (crockery) Stir in spices, sausage, and alligator fillet pieces. Cook until liquid is absorbed and rice doesn't burn on the bottom.
3. Stir occasionally for about 10-15 minutes.
4. Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and bake covered in the oven for 25 minutes.
Alligator Jambalaya is superb but where is the alligator... I have tried this recipe for marinated alligator fillet and found no complaints.
